sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81412" key="periqumia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιθῡμῐάω</orth>, <sense id="n81412.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surround with burning incense</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ κεφαλὴ τοῦ ἰχθύος -ωμένη μετὰ σμύρνης</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
